overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit night market in Night City. The player exits a food stall and walks through a crowded street with vendors and holographic ads, then passes through a narrow back-alley laundromat before returning to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with service counter

events.description: exiting the food stall through the glass door into the open street market

agents.ego_description: walking forward from inside the food stall toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: seated customer with red hair sitting at the counter facing away from camera

entered.detail: metal service counter with condiments and food preparation items
glass cabinet displaying food items on the right side of the stall
metal storage racks with supplies along the left wall
pink and cyan neon signs visible through the stall opening

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a narrow food stall with a metal counter and glass display case. A customer with red hair sits at the counter. The camera moves forward toward the exit, where bright neon signs of the night market are visible through the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street market with vendor stalls and neon advertisements

events.description: fully exited the covered stall into the open street with wet pavement
turning slightly left to navigate around pedestrians and vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded night market street, navigating between pedestrians and vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing orange safety vest standing near food preparation area
pedestrian with red hair and yellow top walking past the camera

entered.detail: rain-slicked black pavement reflecting colorful neon lights
food vendor stall with bright signage and stainless steel counter
large fabric canopy covering the vendor stall area
large digital holographic advertisements on tall building facades

segments.scene_description: Having exited the stall, the camera moves through a bustling cyberpunk street market. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signs and holographic ads covering the tall buildings. The camera passes a vendor in an orange vest and navigates through scattered pedestrians, approaching a food stall with a 'PURE OVERKILL' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back-alley laundromat with industrial washing machines

events.description: entering the narrow laundromat corridor from the open street market
transitioning from bright fluorescent lighting to mixed lighting as approaching the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow corridor between washing machines and storage shelves

notable_agents.action: worker in blue outfit and cap standing near the washing machines

entered.detail: stacked industrial washing machines and dryers against the left wall
bright overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the corridor
metal storage racks with cardboard boxes and laundry supplies
close concrete walls creating a tight passageway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, enclosed laundromat corridor with industrial washing machines lining the left wall and metal shelving stacked with supplies. The space is illuminated by harsh fluorescent lighting. A worker in blue stands near the machines as the camera moves through the tight passage toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall area at the exit of the laundry corridor

events.description: exiting the narrow laundry corridor back into the open street market area

agents.ego_description: approaching a food stall counter after exiting the narrow corridor

notable_agents.action: vendor in white outfit working at the food stall counter

entered.detail: food preparation counter with glass display case and cooking equipment
large industrial metal cooking pot on the counter
bright pink neon sign with text visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow laundromat corridor back into the street market, approaching another food stall with a large cooking pot on the counter. A vendor in white works at the stall while a bright pink neon sign glows in the background. The scene ends with the camera positioned at the stall counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the interior of a small food stall through a vibrant night market and into a sterile industrial corridor before returning to the neon-lit street. It begins inside a narrow stall with a metal counter and a red-haired customer, moving forward toward the bright glow of the market exit. As the camera emerges, the scene expands into a bustling street where wet asphalt reflects towering holographic ads and vibrant neon signs, passing a vendor in an orange vest and a stall marked Pure Overkill. The environment then shifts abruptly into a narrow laundromat corridor characterized by harsh fluorescent lighting, industrial washing machines, and metal shelving. Finally, the camera exits the tight passage back into the open market, approaching a vendor in white at a stall with a large cooking pot under a glowing pink neon sign.
